channel.title: Gpu on Vectors & Verbs
channel.description: Recent content in Gpu on Vectors & Verbs

item.title: The Architecture of Precision: Why Quantization Defines the AI Era
item.description: From FP32 to NF4 — a deep dive into how quantization bridges the gap between trillion-parameter models and the hardware they run on, and why ‘smaller’ is almost always ‘faster’.

item.title: Speed of Thought: Optimizing Gemma 27B with Custom Triton Kernels
item.description: Profiling Gemma 27B on dual RTX 5090 Blackwell GPUs, discovering a legacy CUDA path bottleneck, and building a custom Triton kernel that shaves 1.1 seconds off every inference batch.

item.title: Squeeze every FLOP: Profiling AI models
item.description: This guide covers profiling at the code, framework, and hardware levels using PyTorch and Nsight Systems.

item.title: Mission Impossible: Fitting Trillion-Parameter Giants into 80GB GPUs
item.description: An introduction to optimizations for Large Language Models, covering GPU utilization, precision control, and memory management.
